---
title: "Efficacy"
output: word_document
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
#library(devtools)
#devtools::install_github("ABS-dev/MF")
library(MF)
library(flextable)
library(officer)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r data}

# Load in data and fix columns
# -----------------------------
data <- read.csv("your_efficacy_repeated_data.csv")
colnames(data) <- gsub("\\.", "_", colnames(data)) 
data <- data %>% 
  rename_with(~ gsub("_", "", .), .cols = Halter_) %>%
  mutate(Group = case_when(
    Group == 1 ~ "IVP",
    Group == 2 ~ "Control")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Halter))


# Calculate duration
# -------------------
data_duration <- data %>%
  arrange(Halter, Day) %>%
  group_by(Halter) %>%
  mutate(
    DOC_day  = max(Day[Study_Day == "DOC"], na.rm = TRUE),
    
    # first positive day after DOC (or NA if none)
    StartDay = {
      pos_days <- Day[VI_PCR == "Pos" & Day > DOC_day]
      if(length(pos_days) > 0) min(pos_days) else NA_real_},
    
    # last positive day after DOC (or NA if none)
    EndDay = {
      pos_days <- Day[VI_PCR == "Pos" & Day > DOC_day]
      if(length(pos_days) > 0) max(pos_days) else NA_real_},
    
    Duration = ifelse(!is.na(StartDay) & !is.na(EndDay),
                      EndDay - StartDay + 1,
                      0)) %>%
  ungroup()

# Verify that duration is calculated correctly
# test <- data_duration[, c("Halter", "Day", "VI_PCR", "Duration")]


# Trim dataset to 1 entry per horse
# ----------------------------------
data_duration_individual <- data_duration %>% 
  group_by(Halter) %>%
  slice_tail(n = 1) %>%  # keeps the last row per Halter
  ungroup()

```


```{r MF}

# Calculate mitigated fraction and confidence interval
mf_boot <- MFBoot('Duration ~ Group', data_duration_individual, compare = c("Control", "IVP"))

# Descriptive statistics
summary_table <- data_duration_individual %>%
  group_by(Group) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    Minimum = min(Duration, na.rm = TRUE),
    `25th Percentile` = quantile(Duration, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Median = median(Duration, na.rm = TRUE),
    `75th Percentile` = quantile(Duration, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    Maximum = max(Duration, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    `Mitigated Fraction` = round(mf_boot$stat[1,1], 2),         # point estimate
    `Lower 95% Confidence Bound` = round(mf_boot$stat[1,3], 2), # lower
    `Mitigated Fraction` = ifelse(row_number() == 2, NA, `Mitigated Fraction`),
    `Lower 95% Confidence Bound` = ifelse(row_number() == 2, NA, `Lower 95% Confidence Bound`))

# Create flextable
flextable(summary_table) %>%
  autofit() %>%
  set_caption("Summary of Duration by Treatment Group")

# Boxplot
ggplot(data_duration_individual, aes(y = Group, x = Duration, fill = Group)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, width = 0.6) +
  geom_jitter(height = 0.15, alpha = 0.7, size = 2) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Disease Duration by Treatment Group",
    subtitle = paste0(
      "Mitigated Fraction = ", round(mf_boot$stat[1,1], 2),
      ", Lower 95% CI = ", round(mf_boot$stat[1,3], 2)),
    x = "Duration", y = "Group") +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12))

```
